description: BHIV Mandala Dataset — full Product→Layer→Subsystem→Capability definitions

parikshak.role: Sovereign Evaluation Authority — deterministic task review and scoring engine

capabilities.task_scoring: Binary rubric scoring with PAC detection and formula-based final score
capabilities.review_packet: Hard gate enforcement for REVIEW_PACKET.md validation
capabilities.bucket_logging: Mandatory evaluation logging with trace_id governance

niyantran.role: Task Orchestration Engine — manages task graph, trace_ids, and candidate routing

capabilities.graph_traversal: Deterministic next-task selection from task graph
capabilities.candidate_routing: Route candidates to correct task based on evaluation

gurukul.role: Learning Management System — delivers structured learning paths to candidates

capabilities.skill_assessment: Evaluate candidate skill level and readiness
capabilities.learning_path: Deliver structured curriculum based on assessment

mitra.role: AI Companion — conversational assistant for candidate support and guidance

capabilities.intent_resolution: Detect and resolve candidate intent from natural language
capabilities.guidance_delivery: Provide structured guidance based on candidate state

insightflow.role: Analytics and Reporting Engine — provides insights on candidate and system performance

capabilities.performance_reporting: Generate candidate and system performance reports
capabilities.dashboard_delivery: Deliver real-time dashboards for system monitoring

robotics.role: Robotics Engineering Track — ROS2, embedded systems, and hardware integration tasks

capabilities.hardware_integration: Integrate sensors, actuators, and embedded hardware
capabilities.firmware: Write and deploy firmware for microcontrollers

blockchain.role: Blockchain Engineering Track — smart contracts, DeFi, and distributed ledger tasks

capabilities.smart_contract_development: Write and deploy Solidity smart contracts
capabilities.defi_protocol: Build DeFi protocols with token economics
capabilities.web3_integration: Integrate Web3 frontend with blockchain backend
